{{Quote|Planet has been secured.|An Imperial stormtrooper reports on the assault on Orion IV|<ref name="XW" />|audio=PlanetSecured-XW.flac}}
The '''battle of Orion IV''' was an engagement between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orion IV]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], as part of [[Operation Strike Fear]]. After [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]] [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|chased]] [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] from their [[Brigia Rebel base|headquarters]] on [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]], the Rebels established a new [[Orion IV Rebel base|base]] on Orion IV, a planet close to open rebellion against the Empire.

The Empire soon located the new base and launched an assault. A [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|bombarded]] the surface, before [[Imperial Army/Legends|ground forces]] moved in to secure the planet. The Rebel base was heavily damaged in the attack, and several [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] were captured, but the Alliance was able to evacuate.

==Prelude==
In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="1BBY">The Battle of Turkana takes place after the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] entered service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], which ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' places in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. ''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' establishes that the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|capture of Leia Organa]] occurs at the end of [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]{{'s}} second tour of duty. Organa's capture takes place on 35:3:3 under the [[Great ReSynchronization]] dating system, placing it at the beginning of [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] according to [[Template:YearMathGRS|the following explanation]]. Events in ''Star Wars: X-Wing'' before the end of the second tour of duty therefore take place in 1 BBY.</ref> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] sent a [[Task force/Legends|task force]] of ten [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] to [[Battle of Turkana/Legends|eliminate]] a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]] near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Turkana/Legends|Turkana]] in the [[Pakuuni sector/Legends|Pakuuni sector]]. The attack was defeated when the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance forces]] used their [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] to inflict heavy damage to two of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], forcing the Imperials to withdraw without destroying a single Rebel [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]].<ref name="IH">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''</ref>

Shocked by the loss at Turkana, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] ordered a major offensive code named [[Operation Strike Fear]]. Aimed at suppressing Rebel opposition and spreading fear of the Empire, the campaign's first target was [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]],<ref name="XW" /> a planet in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]]<ref name="CSWE-Brigia">{{CSWECite|I|94|Brigia}}</ref> which was the site of the [[Brigia Rebel base|Alliance's headquarters]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> After [[Mission in the Dellalt system|learning]] about Operation Strike Fear, [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] ordered a precautionary evacuation of the Brigia base. The evacuation was [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|interrupted]] by [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]], but the High Command and key personnel were able to escape.<ref name="XW" /> [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] relocated the [[Orion IV Rebel base|headquarters]] to [[Orion IV]],<ref name="NEGC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> a manufacturing world in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] which was on the verge of open rebellion against the Empire.<ref name="EAE">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-history-of-xim-and-the-tion-cluster|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster|int=Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster}}</ref>

==The battle==
[[File:Orion_iv.png|thumb|left|250px|Star Destroyer fleet bombarding the Rebel base on Orion IV.]]
The base on Orion IV quickly became Operation Strike Fear's next target.<ref name="XW" /> A [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of at least six ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers<ref name="SD" /> entered orbit of the planet and performed a targeted [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] before Imperial [[Imperial Army/Legends|ground forces]] began their assault on the surface. [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] advanced on the Rebel base, with [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|''Alpha''-class Xg-1 Star Wings]] providing aerial support against the Rebel defenses,<ref name="XW" /> including the [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter]].<ref name="R22">An [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]] can be seen in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] cutscene. The A-wing was introduced following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] according to sources released before ''X-Wing'', including the ''[[Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''. ''[[C-3PO: Tales of the Golden Droid]]'' and ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' introduced the [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter]] as the basis for the A-wing's design, [[Retroactive continuity|retconning]] the A-wings seen in ''X-Wing'' before the Battle of Yavin. ''[[The Written Word]]'' established "A-wing" as an informal nickname for the older [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] among [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]].</ref>

With the Rebel opposition defeated, Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] moved in to secure the planet. The Rebel base was heavily damaged during the battle and several [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] stationed there were captured by Imperial forces,<ref name="XW" /> but the Alliance was able to evacuate the base.<ref name="AORCR">[[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' Core Rulebook]]</ref>

==Aftermath==
[[File:Orioniv.png|thumb|right|250px|A stormtrooper surveys prisoners on the newly secured planet.]]
General Dodonna again relocated the Alliance headquarters,<ref name="NEGC" /> moving to several other worlds before establishing a new [[Dantooine base/Legends|main base]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]<ref name="NEC" /> in the [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] learned that Operation Strike Fear's next target was [[Rudrig/Legends|Rudrig]],<ref name="XW" /> also in the Tion Cluster,<ref name="EAE" /> and the Rebels launched an [[Raid on the Juno convoy|operation]] to delay the anticipated attack by preventing the Imperial forces from being resupplied. Operation Strike Fear continued<ref name="XW" /> until later in 1 BBY,<ref name="1BBY" /> when the Alliance [[Destruction of the Invincible|destroyed]] its [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]], the Star Destroyer [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']], by planting a [[Capture of the Gafra|stolen]] Imperial [[Bomb/Legends|explosive device]] aboard the [[Starship/Legends|ship]].<ref name="XW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Imperial attack on Orion IV first appeared in the [[1993]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']], where it is depicted in a cutscene during "Tour of Duty I: A New Ally."<ref name="XW" />
